positive: A symmetrical, minimalist illustration featuring a bioluminescent celestial fox (Kitsune) standing amid geometric constellations and floating nebulas. The style should be highly detailed modern vector art mixed with ethereal stained-glass aesthetics. Focus on deep indigo, electric teal, metallic gold, and pops of vibrant magenta. The composition must be centered and suitable for a repeating pattern or single graphic print. Use strong, clean silhouettes against a subtle gradient background. Highly contrasting lines, linocut texture combined with glowing effects. Artwork is centered, clean edges, vector quality, 4k resolution.
negative: blur, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, grain, noise, busy background, excessive detail, writing, messy lines, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient wash, photographic, photorealism
